CustomField.formula:
IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Allied'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Contract Full Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Therapy__r.FirstName &" "& Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Therapy__r.LastName, IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Allied'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Contract Part Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Therapy__r.FirstName &" "& Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Therapy__r.LastName, IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Nursing'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Contract Full Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Nursing__r.FirstName &" "& Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Nursing__r.LastName, IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Nursing'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Contract Part Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Nursing__r.FirstName &" "& Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Nursing__r.LastName, IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Allied'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Permanent Full Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Therapy__r.FirstName &" "& Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Therapy__r.LastName ,
IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Allied'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Permanent Part Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Therapy__r.FirstName &" "& Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Therapy__r.LastName , IF ( AND(ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Nursing'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Permanent Full Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Nursing__r.FirstName &" "& Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Nursing__r.LastName , IF ( AND(ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Nursing'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Permanent Part Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Nursing__r.FirstName &" "& Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Nursing__r.LastName , IF ( AND(ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Nursing'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Temp To Perm")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Nursing__r.FirstName &" "& Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Nursing__r.LastName ,
IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Administrative'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Contract Full Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Administration__r.FirstName &" "& Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Administration__r.LastName , IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Administrative'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Contract Part Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Administration__r.FirstName &" "& Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Administration__r.LastName , IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Administrative'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Permanent Full Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Administration__r.FirstName &" "& Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Administration__r.LastName ,
IF ( AND (ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Administrative'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Permanent Part Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Administration__r.FirstName &" "& Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Administration__r.LastName , IF ( AND(ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Administrative'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Temp To Perm")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Administration__r.FirstName &" "& Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Administration__r.LastName,
IF (ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Physician/Advanced Practice"), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Physician__r.FirstName & " " & Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Physician__r.LastName , "") ) ) ) )) )))) )))))
CustomField.label: Biz Dev Rep
